pageContext.name: Demon Slayer Set (Vol 1.) Chokorin Mascot
pageContext.description: Chokorin Demon Slayer (Vol.1) is back! Chokorin is a series of cute deformed figures. You can collect them, go out together, take pictures, and enjoy various situations. It can stand on its own with a dedicated pedestal.  This Collectible Set includes Kamado Tanjiro, Zenitsu Agatsuma, Inosuke Hashibira, Shinobu Kocho, Nezuko Kamado, and Giyu Tomioka.   All the popular characters are here, don't miss your chance to add this set to your Demon Slayer collection today!
